cost/balanceBefore/balanceAfter bookkeeping, purchase flag not persisted

Insufficient balance blocks; disabled during autoplay; no super-buy tier; no rebuy prompt
Cost/decline/confirm assertions for the buy flow
Table of event ids/payloads/emit conditions for base spin, FS, buy
FREE SPINS step 2 fires `vault_init` with the 8-position pre-mark applied at `fs_start`, before the spin loop
all_verdicts.replacement:
**BASE SPIN**
1. `spin_start`
2. `bet_deduct`
3. `reels_spin`
4. `reels_land`
5. `ways_evaluate` (compute every symbol's leftmost run + ways)
6. `scatter_check`
7. IF totalWin > 0: `win_present` → (IF win ≥ named-tier threshold: `win_tier_banner`)
8. IF scatterCount ≥ 3: `fs_trigger` → go to FREE SPINS
9. `round_end`

**FREE SPINS** (entered via `fs_trigger` or [[buy_feature-mechanics]])
1. `fs_start`
2. `vault_init` (vaultValue = 20×bet, markedCount = 0 — no positions are pre-marked yet)
3. FREE-SPIN LOOP (repeat 10 times, or until win cap): a..f
   a. `fs_spin_start`
   b. `fs_reels_land`
   c. `fs_ways_evaluate` → per winning way containing wilds: `wild_multiplier_apply`
   d. IF this is free spin 1: mark 8 random positions on reels 2–4 (`markedCount = 8`) — paytable page 3 confirms this happens "after the first free spin", not at round start — THEN per `cleopatra` on an unmarked cell: `cleopatra_mark`
   e. per `wild_multiplier` / scatter landing: `vault_increment`
   f. `fs_spin_end`
4. `vault_resolve` (pay iff markedCount == 20, else forfeit)
5. `fs_end` → resume base game

**BUY MODE** (differs only at entry)
`buy_open` → (`buy_decline` → base) OR (`buy_confirm` → `buy_charge` → forced 3-scatter `reels_land` → `fs_trigger` → FREE SPINS as above).

all_verdicts.claim: FS entered only after scatter_check≥3; wild multiplier applied once per way per spin; vault_resolve fires once at fs_end iff markedCount==20
Deterministic seeded PRNG stub, uniform draw order for reels + Vault pre-mark + wild increments
Spin/round reproducible from (seed,stake,mode); rule changes invalidate golden snapshots
3+ scatter triggers flat 10 FS; scatters also pay 1x/5x/25x for 3/4/5
≥3 scatter trigger, 10 flat spins, night reel set, no retrigger, wild_multiplier present, buy entry 30x
Step 4 initializes the Vault with 8 positions pre-marked before the spin loop begins
all_verdicts.replacement:
1. On base spin resolution, count `scatter` symbols on the board.
2. If count ≥ 3: pay the scatter award, emit `fs_trigger`, and set `freeSpinsLeft = 10`.
3. Show the "CONGRATULATIONS — YOU HAVE WON 10 FREE SPINS" screen, then transition to the night-temple reel set.
4. Initialize the Vault (see [[vault_bonus-mechanics]]): `vaultValue = 20 × totalBet`, `markedCount = 0`. The 8-position pre-mark on reels 2–4 is applied after the FIRST free spin resolves, not before spin 1 — confirmed by in-game paytable page 3 ("When the round starts, after the first free spin, 8 random positions... are marked").
5. LOOP while `freeSpinsLeft > 0`:
   a. `freeSpinsLeft -= 1`; spin the FS reels.
   b. Evaluate ways wins with `wild_multiplier` substitution and multiplicative stacking (see [[wild_multiplier-mechanics]]).
   c. On spin 1 only: apply the 8-position Vault pre-mark. Apply Vault marking/increments for any `cleopatra`, `wild_multiplier`, and `scatter` landings.
   d. Add the spin win to `roundWin`; present it.
6. On `freeSpinsLeft == 0`: resolve the Vault (pay if 20/20 marked, else forfeit — see [[vault_bonus-mechanics]]).
7. Present the round-outro summary card (total FS win) unless "Skip Screens" is enabled; return to base game.

Per-symbol pay table (mostly estimated) with regular symbols paying only at 3/4/5-of-a-kind, no 2-band
all_verdicts.replacement:
Units = multiples of total bet. All values below are read directly off the in-game paytable (page 1 for regular symbols/wild, page 2 for wild_multiplier/scatter) at a $2.00 total bet — all exact, none estimated.

| symbol | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | note |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cleopatra` | 0.25 | 2.5 | 3.75 | 5 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.50/$5.00/$7.50/$10.00) |
| `scarab` | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.20/$4.00/$6.00/$8.00) |
| `ring` | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | exact — paytable p1, identical to scarab ($0.20/$4.00/$6.00/$8.00) |
| `eye_of_horus` | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($2.00/$5.00/$7.00) |
| `coin` | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 | exact — paytable p1, identical to eye_of_horus ($2.00/$5.00/$7.00) |
| `A` | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.50/$3.00/$6.00) |
| `K` | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 | exact — paytable p1, identical to A |
| `Q` | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.30/$2.00/$5.00) |
| `J` | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 | exact — paytable p1, identical to Q |
| `T` (10) | — | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.30/$1.00/$4.00) |
| `9` | 0.1 | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.20/$0.30/$1.00/$4.00) |
| `wild_multiplier` | 0.5 | 5 | 12.5 | 25 | exact — paytable p2, FS only |
| `scatter` | — | 1 | 5 | 25 | exact — paytable p2 |

**Win formula:** `win = paytable[sym][run] × ways × totalBet`, where `run` ∈ {2,3,4,5} for `cleopatra`/`scarab`/`ring`/`9` (each has a confirmed 2-of-a-kind rate) or `run` ∈ {3,4,5} for all other regular symbols. Scatters pay `paytable.scatter[count] × totalBet` (anywhere, not per-way). In Free Spins, per-way wins are further multiplied by `2^(wilds in that way)`.

4x5, 1024 ways, win rule requires 3, 4 or 5 consecutive reels from reel 1 for any regular symbol
all_verdicts.replacement: **Win rule (one sentence):** A regular symbol pays when it appears on **2 or more consecutive reels starting from the leftmost reel (reel 1)** — `cleopatra`, `scarab`, `ring` and `9` are confirmed to pay from 2-of-a-kind, while all other regular symbols (`coin`, `eye_of_horus`, `A`, `K`, `Q`, `J`, `10`) require 3-of-a-kind minimum — and the payout equals `paytable[symbol][reelRun] × ways × totalBet`, where `ways` = the product of the number of matching symbols (including substituting wilds) on each contributing reel. Scatters pay anywhere (not per-way).

all_verdicts.claim: Per-symbol pay bands 3/4/5 (estimated) plus wild/scatter exact rows
all_verdicts.replacement:
Pay values are **multiples of total bet**, all read directly off the in-game paytable (page 1) at a $2.00 total bet — exact, not estimated.

| id | type | tier | band 2 | band 3 | band 4 | band 5 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cleopatra` | regular | high | 0.25 | 2.5 | 3.75 | 5 |
| `scarab` | regular | high | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| `ring` | regular | high | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| `eye_of_horus` | regular | mid | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 |
| `coin` | regular | mid | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 |
| `A` | regular | low | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 |
| `K` | regular | low | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 |
| `Q` | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 |
| `J` | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 |
| `T` (10) | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 |
| `9` | regular | low | 0.1 | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 |

**Wilds / Scatter** (unchanged, already exact):

| id | type | tier | pays | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `wild_base` | wild | high | no independent pay | Pyramid Wild; substitutes for all symbols except Scatter; restricted to reels 2, 3, 4 in base game (paytable p1) |
| `wild_multiplier` | wild | high | 2→0.5, 3→5, 4→12.5, 5→25 | exact — paytable p2; Free Spins only; carries ×2, stacks multiplicatively |
| `scatter` | scatter | high | 3→1, 4→5, 5→25 | exact — paytable p2; triggers 10 Free Spins on 3+; in FS adds 10x/50x/250x to Vault for 3/4/5 |

20x start value, 8 positions pre-marked at start on reels 2-4, wild increment range unobserved/assumption, scatter increment exact
all_verdicts.replacement:
| Constant | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Starting Vault value | 20 × total bet ($40 at $2 bet) | paytable p3, live |
| Total positions | 20 (the full 5×4 board = 20 cells) | paytable p3, live |
| Pre-marked positions | 8, on reels 2–4 — applied **after the first free spin resolves**, not at round start | paytable p3 ("When the round starts, after the first free spin, 8 random positions... are marked") |
| Marker source | each `cleopatra` on an **unmarked** cell marks it | paytable p3, live |
| Wild increment | exact table (paytable p2): 1 wild → 1x/1.5x/2x/2.5x/5x/12.5x/25x/50x; 2 wilds → 5x/10x/25x/50x/100x/250x/500x/2500x; 3 wilds → 7.5x/15x/37.5x/75x/150x/375x/750x/12500x; 4 wilds → 10x/20x/50x/100x/200x/500x/1000x/12500x; 5 wilds → 12.5x/25x/62.5x/125x/250x/625x/1250x/12500x; 6+ wilds → 15x/30x/75x/150x/300x/750x/1500x/12500x (all × total bet) | paytable p2, exact |
| Scatter increment (in FS) | +10× / +50× / +250× total bet for 3 / 4 / 5 scatters | paytable p3, exact |
| Payout condition | ALL 20 positions marked by round end | paytable p3, live |
| On shortfall | Vault **forfeited** (pays 0) | live |

all_verdicts.claim: Step 1 pre-marks 8 positions at fs_start before any spins; marks/value persist across spins; pay iff 20/20 at fs_end
all_verdicts.replacement:
1. At `fs_start`: `vaultValue = 20 × totalBet`; `markedCount = 0` (no positions pre-marked yet — paytable page 3 confirms the 8-position pre-mark happens after the first free spin, not at round start).
2. After free spin 1's reels land: select and mark 8 random positions on reels 2–4 (`markedCount = 8`); play the gold sparkle-burst per newly-marked cell.
3. For each free spin (including spin 1, after the step-2 pre-mark on spin 1), after reels land:
   a. For each `cleopatra` on an unmarked cell: mark it, `markedCount += 1` (cap 20); play the gold sparkle-burst.
   b. For each `wild_multiplier` landing: `vaultValue += randomWildIncrement` (from the exact increment table).
   c. If `scatter` count ≥ 3 this spin: `vaultValue += {3:10×,4:50×,5:250×} × totalBet`.
4. Marks and value persist across spins within the round.
5. At `fs_end` (`freeSpinsLeft == 0`):
   - IF `markedCount == 20`: pay `vaultValue`, emit `vault_resolve{paid:true}`.
   - ELSE: forfeit — `vault_resolve{paid:false, vaultPayout:0}`.

Per-way wildsInWay and multiplier computed per spin; no persistence across spins
Substitutes like a wild; multiplier applied per-way at evaluation time; landing increments the Vault; only exists inside Free Spins
Multiple wilds multiply not add; multiplier affects only ways containing it; post-multiplier totals still clamp to the 12,500x cap
Stacking multiplier assertions, per-way scoping, absence from base game

all_replacements:
**BASE SPIN**
1. `spin_start`
2. `bet_deduct`
3. `reels_spin`
4. `reels_land`
5. `ways_evaluate` (compute every symbol's leftmost run + ways)
6. `scatter_check`
7. IF totalWin > 0: `win_present` → (IF win ≥ named-tier threshold: `win_tier_banner`)
8. IF scatterCount ≥ 3: `fs_trigger` → go to FREE SPINS
9. `round_end`

**FREE SPINS** (entered via `fs_trigger` or [[buy_feature-mechanics]])
1. `fs_start`
2. `vault_init` (vaultValue = 20×bet, markedCount = 0 — no positions are pre-marked yet)
3. FREE-SPIN LOOP (repeat 10 times, or until win cap): a..f
   a. `fs_spin_start`
   b. `fs_reels_land`
   c. `fs_ways_evaluate` → per winning way containing wilds: `wild_multiplier_apply`
   d. IF this is free spin 1: mark 8 random positions on reels 2–4 (`markedCount = 8`) — paytable page 3 confirms this happens "after the first free spin", not at round start — THEN per `cleopatra` on an unmarked cell: `cleopatra_mark`
   e. per `wild_multiplier` / scatter landing: `vault_increment`
   f. `fs_spin_end`
4. `vault_resolve` (pay iff markedCount == 20, else forfeit)
5. `fs_end` → resume base game

**BUY MODE** (differs only at entry)
`buy_open` → (`buy_decline` → base) OR (`buy_confirm` → `buy_charge` → forced 3-scatter `reels_land` → `fs_trigger` → FREE SPINS as above).

1. On base spin resolution, count `scatter` symbols on the board.
2. If count ≥ 3: pay the scatter award, emit `fs_trigger`, and set `freeSpinsLeft = 10`.
3. Show the "CONGRATULATIONS — YOU HAVE WON 10 FREE SPINS" screen, then transition to the night-temple reel set.
4. Initialize the Vault (see [[vault_bonus-mechanics]]): `vaultValue = 20 × totalBet`, `markedCount = 0`. The 8-position pre-mark on reels 2–4 is applied after the FIRST free spin resolves, not before spin 1 — confirmed by in-game paytable page 3 ("When the round starts, after the first free spin, 8 random positions... are marked").
5. LOOP while `freeSpinsLeft > 0`:
   a. `freeSpinsLeft -= 1`; spin the FS reels.
   b. Evaluate ways wins with `wild_multiplier` substitution and multiplicative stacking (see [[wild_multiplier-mechanics]]).
   c. On spin 1 only: apply the 8-position Vault pre-mark. Apply Vault marking/increments for any `cleopatra`, `wild_multiplier`, and `scatter` landings.
   d. Add the spin win to `roundWin`; present it.
6. On `freeSpinsLeft == 0`: resolve the Vault (pay if 20/20 marked, else forfeit — see [[vault_bonus-mechanics]]).
7. Present the round-outro summary card (total FS win) unless "Skip Screens" is enabled; return to base game.

Units = multiples of total bet. All values below are read directly off the in-game paytable (page 1 for regular symbols/wild, page 2 for wild_multiplier/scatter) at a $2.00 total bet — all exact, none estimated.

| symbol | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | note |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cleopatra` | 0.25 | 2.5 | 3.75 | 5 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.50/$5.00/$7.50/$10.00) |
| `scarab` | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.20/$4.00/$6.00/$8.00) |
| `ring` | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | exact — paytable p1, identical to scarab ($0.20/$4.00/$6.00/$8.00) |
| `eye_of_horus` | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($2.00/$5.00/$7.00) |
| `coin` | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 | exact — paytable p1, identical to eye_of_horus ($2.00/$5.00/$7.00) |
| `A` | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.50/$3.00/$6.00) |
| `K` | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 | exact — paytable p1, identical to A |
| `Q` | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.30/$2.00/$5.00) |
| `J` | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 | exact — paytable p1, identical to Q |
| `T` (10) | — | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 | exact — paytable p1, no 2-band ($0.30/$1.00/$4.00) |
| `9` | 0.1 | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 | exact — paytable p1 ($0.20/$0.30/$1.00/$4.00) |
| `wild_multiplier` | 0.5 | 5 | 12.5 | 25 | exact — paytable p2, FS only |
| `scatter` | — | 1 | 5 | 25 | exact — paytable p2 |

**Win formula:** `win = paytable[sym][run] × ways × totalBet`, where `run` ∈ {2,3,4,5} for `cleopatra`/`scarab`/`ring`/`9` (each has a confirmed 2-of-a-kind rate) or `run` ∈ {3,4,5} for all other regular symbols. Scatters pay `paytable.scatter[count] × totalBet` (anywhere, not per-way). In Free Spins, per-way wins are further multiplied by `2^(wilds in that way)`.

**Win rule (one sentence):** A regular symbol pays when it appears on **2 or more consecutive reels starting from the leftmost reel (reel 1)** — `cleopatra`, `scarab`, `ring` and `9` are confirmed to pay from 2-of-a-kind, while all other regular symbols (`coin`, `eye_of_horus`, `A`, `K`, `Q`, `J`, `10`) require 3-of-a-kind minimum — and the payout equals `paytable[symbol][reelRun] × ways × totalBet`, where `ways` = the product of the number of matching symbols (including substituting wilds) on each contributing reel. Scatters pay anywhere (not per-way).

Pay values are **multiples of total bet**, all read directly off the in-game paytable (page 1) at a $2.00 total bet — exact, not estimated.

| id | type | tier | band 2 | band 3 | band 4 | band 5 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cleopatra` | regular | high | 0.25 | 2.5 | 3.75 | 5 |
| `scarab` | regular | high | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| `ring` | regular | high | 0.1 | 2 | 3 | 4 |
| `eye_of_horus` | regular | mid | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 |
| `coin` | regular | mid | — | 1 | 2.5 | 3.5 |
| `A` | regular | low | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 |
| `K` | regular | low | — | 0.25 | 1.5 | 3 |
| `Q` | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 |
| `J` | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 1 | 2.5 |
| `T` (10) | regular | low | — | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 |
| `9` | regular | low | 0.1 | 0.15 | 0.5 | 2 |

**Wilds / Scatter** (unchanged, already exact):

| id | type | tier | pays | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `wild_base` | wild | high | no independent pay | Pyramid Wild; substitutes for all symbols except Scatter; restricted to reels 2, 3, 4 in base game (paytable p1) |
| `wild_multiplier` | wild | high | 2→0.5, 3→5, 4→12.5, 5→25 | exact — paytable p2; Free Spins only; carries ×2, stacks multiplicatively |
| `scatter` | scatter | high | 3→1, 4→5, 5→25 | exact — paytable p2; triggers 10 Free Spins on 3+; in FS adds 10x/50x/250x to Vault for 3/4/5 |
**Then:** `cleopatra` on reels 1,2,3 (1 each) → run 3, ways = 1×1×1 = 1. Actual band-3 rate is $5.00 at $2 bet (2.5× total bet), per paytable page 1. **Win = 2.5 × 1 × $2.00 = $5.00.**
**Then:** `cleopatra` on reels 1–4 → run 4, ways = 1. Actual band-4 rate is $7.50 at $2 bet (3.75× total bet), per paytable page 1. **Win = 3.75 × 1 × $2.00 = $7.50.**
**Then:** `cleopatra` reels 1–3 (1 way) — actual band-3 rate $5.00 (2.5×) = $5.00; `scarab` reels 1–3 (1 way) — actual band-3 rate $4.00 (2×) = $4.00. **Total = $9.00.**
**Then:** `wild_base` (reel 2, allowed) completes `cleopatra` on reels 1–3 → run 3, ways = 1. Actual band-3 rate is $5.00 at $2 bet (2.5× total bet). **Win = 2.5 × 1 × $2.00 = $5.00.**

**Given:** FS round start — vaultValue = 20 × $2 = $40.00, markedCount = 0 (the 8-position pre-mark on reels 2–4 is applied only after free spin 1 resolves, per paytable page 3 — not at round start). After spin 1: +8 marks (→8/20) plus any Cleopatra hits that spin; a wild adds +$10 (→$50). Round ends with markedCount = 16/20, vaultValue = $52.00.
**Then:** `vault_resolve{markedCount:16, paid:false, vaultPayout:$0.00}` — Vault forfeited; round pays only its line/scatter wins.
**Then:** win = 2.5 × bet → **$5.00 / $2.50 / $0.50** for bets $2.00 / $1.00 / $0.20 respectively (actual `cleopatra` band-3 rate is 2.5× total bet, not 1×).

| Constant | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Starting Vault value | 20 × total bet ($40 at $2 bet) | paytable p3, live |
| Total positions | 20 (the full 5×4 board = 20 cells) | paytable p3, live |
| Pre-marked positions | 8, on reels 2–4 — applied **after the first free spin resolves**, not at round start | paytable p3 ("When the round starts, after the first free spin, 8 random positions... are marked") |
| Marker source | each `cleopatra` on an **unmarked** cell marks it | paytable p3, live |
| Wild increment | exact table (paytable p2): 1 wild → 1x/1.5x/2x/2.5x/5x/12.5x/25x/50x; 2 wilds → 5x/10x/25x/50x/100x/250x/500x/2500x; 3 wilds → 7.5x/15x/37.5x/75x/150x/375x/750x/12500x; 4 wilds → 10x/20x/50x/100x/200x/500x/1000x/12500x; 5 wilds → 12.5x/25x/62.5x/125x/250x/625x/1250x/12500x; 6+ wilds → 15x/30x/75x/150x/300x/750x/1500x/12500x (all × total bet) | paytable p2, exact |
| Scatter increment (in FS) | +10× / +50× / +250× total bet for 3 / 4 / 5 scatters | paytable p3, exact |
| Payout condition | ALL 20 positions marked by round end | paytable p3, live |
| On shortfall | Vault **forfeited** (pays 0) | live |

1. At `fs_start`: `vaultValue = 20 × totalBet`; `markedCount = 0` (no positions pre-marked yet — paytable page 3 confirms the 8-position pre-mark happens after the first free spin, not at round start).
2. After free spin 1's reels land: select and mark 8 random positions on reels 2–4 (`markedCount = 8`); play the gold sparkle-burst per newly-marked cell.
3. For each free spin (including spin 1, after the step-2 pre-mark on spin 1), after reels land:
   a. For each `cleopatra` on an unmarked cell: mark it, `markedCount += 1` (cap 20); play the gold sparkle-burst.
   b. For each `wild_multiplier` landing: `vaultValue += randomWildIncrement` (from the exact increment table).
   c. If `scatter` count ≥ 3 this spin: `vaultValue += {3:10×,4:50×,5:250×} × totalBet`.
4. Marks and value persist across spins within the round.
5. At `fs_end` (`freeSpinsLeft == 0`):
   - IF `markedCount == 20`: pay `vaultValue`, emit `vault_resolve{paid:true}`.
   - ELSE: forfeit — `vault_resolve{paid:false, vaultPayout:0}`.

1. Assert `markedCount` starts at 0, becomes 8 after free spin 1's pre-mark, and increments by exactly one per `cleopatra` on an unmarked cell thereafter, never exceeding 20.
2. Assert Vault pays only when `markedCount == 20`; every `< 20` end state pays 0.
3. Assert scatter-in-FS adds +10×/+50×/+250× for 3/4/5 and that `vaultValue` starts at exactly 20× total bet.

- **Estimated / not shown in-game:** hit frequency, operator-configurable RTP tiers (94.56%/95.51%).
